entities.name: ADH1B
entities.context: Gene (rs1229984) controlling alcohol breakdown rate; V has CC genotype indicating standard metabolism

entities.name: ALDH2
entities.context: Gene (rs671) for acetaldehyde-processing enzyme; V has GG genotype indicating functional enzyme

entities.name: Acetaldehyde Metabolism
entities.context: Process of breaking down toxic acetaldehyde intermediate during alcohol processing

entities.name: Asian Flush
entities.context: Alcohol intolerance reaction caused by ALDH2 dysfunction; V does not have this

entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable device for tracking sleep and heart rate to quantify alcohol's personal effects

relationships.context: ALDH2 enzyme processes acetaldehyde during alcohol metabolism
Dysfunctional ALDH2 causes Asian flush response; functional ALDH2 prevents it
Sequential genes in alcohol metabolism pathway - ADH1B breaks down alcohol, ALDH2 processes the resulting acetaldehyde
Can be used to track downstream effects of alcohol metabolism on sleep and heart rate
